task.title: Create main.ts entry point with KAPLAY init and scene loading
Main menu scene with title, new game button, keyboard support
Intro narrative scene with story text and proceed action
Type definitions for rooms, dungeon, entities, spells, player state
Game state management module with player init, room helpers, movement
Dungeon content data for 3 floors with rooms, exits, entities
Game scene with floor map rendering, room selection, movement
HUD bar showing HP, mana, level, crystals, dungeon tick
Room info panel and room-type-specific actions (rest, search, talk, forge, fight)
Combat scene with enemy display, player stats, combat log, Fight/Spells/Bag/Run
Combat resolution: damage calc, spell casting, items, flee, win/lose, XP/crystals
Dialogue scene with NPC name, lines, advance/exit flow
Rune and spell content data (26 runes, authored spells)
Rune forge scene for crafting spells from runes
Entity content data for all 3 floors (enemies, bosses, NPCs)
Save/load system, game over scene, boss floor progression
Production build to game/dist/, verify playable index.html
